cashback.notes: Unlimited, non-expiring cashback credited directly as Amazon Pay balance
Includes utility bills, insurance premiums, and general offline/online spends

loungeAccess.conditions: Requires ₹75,000+ spend in the preceding calendar quarter; access limited to the Visa domestic lounge network; ₹2 authorization fee per visit; maximum 3 hours per visit.

source.name: 1Finance
source.document: Amazon Pay ICICI Credit Card: Complete review 2026

faqTemplateAnswers.Is this card lifetime free?: Yes. There is no joining fee, annual fee, or renewal fee — it is genuinely free for life with no spend-based waiver condition.
faqTemplateAnswers.Is it worth it?: Yes, especially for Amazon Prime members and frequent Amazon.in shoppers — unlimited 5% cashback (Prime) or 3% (non-Prime) with no annual fee and a low 1.99% forex markup make it one of the best value lifetime-free cards in India.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should get this card?: Regular Amazon.in shoppers, Amazon Prime subscribers, and anyone wanting a genuinely fee-free everyday card with a low forex markup for occasional foreign spends.
faqTemplateAnswers.Does it support UPI?: No. It is issued on the Visa network only, with no RuPay variant, so it cannot be linked to UPI apps for payments.
faqTemplateAnswers.Can I get lounge access with this card?: Only conditionally — 1 complimentary domestic Visa lounge visit per quarter, but only if you spent ₹75,000 or more in the preceding calendar quarter (plus a ₹2 authorization fee per visit).
faqTemplateAnswers.What income is required to qualify?: ICICI Bank requires a minimum monthly income of about ₹25,000 for existing ICICI Bank customers, or ₹30,000 for non-ICICI-customer applicants.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should avoid this card?: Shoppers who don't use Amazon.in regularly, need UPI linkage, or want unconditional lounge access — the cashback and lounge perks are Amazon/spend-dependent.
faqTemplateAnswers.What are the best alternatives?: HDFC Millennia (broader 5% across 10 brands including food delivery) or Flipkart Axis Bank Card if Flipkart is your primary shopping platform.
